description_long: This radiator features a series of evenly spaced horizontal bars, finished in a dark blue color, mounted on a rectangular frame. The bars are tubular and parallel, providing ample surface area for heat dissipation. At the bottom right, there is a visible valve assembly, likely for water or steam regulation, with metallic components. The radiator is mounted flush against a flat surface, suggesting a wall-mounted installation. The overall design is modern and functional, with a clean, utilitarian aesthetic. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with some plastic or rubber components at the valve connections.
description: A modern, wall-mounted blue radiator with horizontal tubular bars and a visible valve assembly at the bottom right.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of horizontal bars and the valve assembly at the bottom right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and depth of the radiator, with the bars and frame visible in cross-section.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat mounting surface with minimal visible features except for two small circular elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the radiator's depth and the frame structure.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at bottom right, horizontally oriented
